{"content": "     1|# PRD: Balloon Metadata Strategy
     2|
     3|## Requirements Summary
     4|This plan decides how the Orbi webtoon lane should evolve from the current post-render balloon placement pipeline toward a more robust metadata contract. The decision must stay tightly scoped to three choices:
     5|- generation-time fal metadata,
     6|- post-render VLM analysis,
     7|- or a hybrid of semantic hints plus image-grounded proposals.
     8|
     9|The current system already places balloons after image generation. The analyzer scores safe zones and emits panel-specific attachment guidance, while the renderer chooses final geometry and writes review/debug metadata. [docs/plans/orbi-live-webtoon-20260420/webtoon/ep001/analyze_balloon_zones.py:460](docs/plans/orbi-live-webtoon-20260420/webtoon/ep001/analyze_balloon_zones.py:460) [docs/plans/orbi-live-webtoon-20260420/webtoon/ep001/analyze_balloon_zones.py:498](docs/plans/orbi-live-webtoon-20260420/webtoon/ep001/analyze_balloon_zones.py:498) [docs/plans/orbi-live-webtoon-20260420/webtoon/ep001/render_balloons.py:545](docs/plans/orbi-live-webtoon-20260420/webtoon/ep001/render_balloons.py:545)
    10|
    11|The current fal live lane does not produce structured layout metadata. It sends prompts to `fal-ai/flux-2-pro` and overlays balloons afterward with fixed heuristics. [docs/plans/orbi-romance-webtoon-20260421/webtoon/ep001/render_webtoon_fal_live.py:50](docs/plans/orbi-romance-webtoon-20260421/webtoon/ep001/render_webtoon_fal_live.py:50) [docs/plans/orbi-romance-webtoon-20260421/webtoon/ep001/render_webtoon_fal_live.py:93](docs/plans/orbi-romance-webtoon-20260421/webtoon/ep001/render_webtoon_fal_live.py:93)
    12|
    13|## RALPLAN-DR Summary
    14|
    15|### Principles
    16|1. Keep final pixel geometry downstream and deterministic.
    17|2. Separate semantic intent from image-grounded observation.
    18|3. Preserve manual-review and fallback visibility when confidence is weak.
    19|4. Reuse the current analyzer/renderer contract instead of coupling layout tightly to generation.
    20|
    21|### Decision Drivers
    22|1. Current placement authority already lives in the analyzer plus renderer, not in fal. [docs/plans/orbi-live-webtoon-20260420/webtoon/ep001/analyze_balloon_zones.py:590](docs/plans/orbi-live-webtoon-20260420/webtoon/ep001/analyze_balloon_zones.py:590) [docs/plans/orbi-live-webtoon-20260420/webtoon/ep001/render_balloons.py:710](docs/plans/orbi-live-webtoon-20260420/webtoon/ep001/render_balloons.py:710)
    23|2. fal generation currently returns image outputs only, so exact layout coordinates would require an additional non-native contract anyway. [docs/plans/orbi-romance-webtoon-20260421/webtoon/ep001/render_webtoon_fal_live.py:50](docs/plans/orbi-romance-webtoon-20260421/webtoon/ep001/render_webtoon_fal_live.py:50)
    24|3. The current pipeline already has deterministic review/fallback hooks that should remain the last safety net. [docs/plans/orbi-live-webtoon-20260420/webtoon/ep001/analyze_balloon_zones.py:550](docs/plans/orbi-live-webtoon-20260420/webtoon/ep001/analyze_balloon_zones.py:550) [docs/plans/orbi-live-webtoon-20260420/webtoon/ep001/render_balloons.py:730](docs/plans/orbi-live-webtoon-20260420/webtoon/ep001/render_balloons.py:730)
    25|
    26|### Viable Options
    27|| Option | Summary | Pros | Cons |
    28|| --- | --- | --- | --- |
    29|| A. Generation-time exact metadata | Ask fal or the generation layer to emit box/tail coordinates up front. | Lowest downstream compute if it works; simple render pass. | Weakly grounded in actual output image; current fal path has no native structured layout return; brittle under composition drift. |
    30|| B. Post-render VLM-only metadata | Ignore generation hints and use a VLM pass to derive all balloon placement metadata from final images. | Grounded in actual pixels; can adapt to drifted compositions. | Adds latency/cost and a second probabilistic model; risks replacing deterministic reviewable heuristics with opaque outputs. |
    31|| C. Hybrid semantic-intent + optional VLM proposals + deterministic final placement | Generation/adaptation provides intent; VLM may refine observations from actual image; analyzer/renderer keeps final geometry authority. | Aligns with current architecture; preserves deterministic placement and debug manifests; uses VLM only where image grounding matters. | More contract design work; requires clear precedence rules to avoid hint/proposal conflicts. |
    32|
    33|## Current-State Explanation
    34|Today the system works in two downstream phases:
    35|
    36|1. `analyze_balloon_zones.py` classifies panel mode and overlay tracks, builds forbidden zones, scores a reusable safe-zone library against the rendered image, and merges panel-specific attachment profiles containing `speaker_anchors`, `speaker_local_zones`, `panel_overrides`, `item_overrides`, and `tail_policy`. [docs/plans/orbi-live-webtoon-20260420/webtoon/ep001/analyze_balloon_zones.py:382](docs/plans/orbi-live-webtoon-20260420/webtoon/ep001/analyze_balloon_zones.py:382) [docs/plans/orbi-live-webtoon-20260420/webtoon/ep001/analyze_balloon_zones.py:413](docs/plans/orbi-live-webtoon-20260420/webtoon/ep001/analyze_balloon_zones.py:413) [docs/plans/orbi-live-webtoon-20260420/webtoon/ep001/analyze_balloon_zones.py:498](docs/plans/orbi-live-webtoon-20260420/webtoon/ep001/analyze_balloon_zones.py:498)
    37|2. `render_balloons.py` resolves anchors, measures text boxes, evaluates candidate zones, scores attachment quality, marks review reasons, and persists a placement manifest. Tail geometry is scored but currently not drawn in the live lane. [docs/plans/orbi-live-webtoon-20260420/webtoon/ep001/render_balloons.py:130](docs/plans/orbi-live-webtoon-20260420/webtoon/ep001/render_balloons.py:130) [docs/plans/orbi-live-webtoon-20260420/webtoon/ep001/render_balloons.py:399](docs/plans/orbi-live-webtoon-20260420/webtoon/ep001/render_balloons.py:399) [docs/plans/orbi-live-webtoon-20260420/webtoon/ep001/render_balloons.py:545](docs/plans/orbi-live-webtoon-20260420/webtoon/ep001/render_balloons.py:545)
    38|
    39|This means the next-version strategy should extend this boundary rather than pretend there is already a generation-native layout system.
    40|
    41|## Evaluation Matrix
    42|| Criterion | Generation-Time Exact Metadata | Post-Render VLM-Only | Hybrid Recommended Contract |
    43|| --- | --- | --- | --- |
    44|| Grounded in actual rendered pixels | Low | High | High when VLM enabled; medium otherwise via current heuristics |
    45|| Compatible with current pipeline | Low | Medium | High |
    46|| Deterministic final placement | Low | Medium | High |
    47|| Debuggability / manifest traceability | Low | Medium | High |
    48|| Dependency on fal API behavior | High | Low | Medium |
    49|| Risk from composition drift | High | Low | Low |
    50|| Added latency/cost | Low | High | Medium |
    51|| Safe fallback path | Weak | Medium | Strong |
    52|
    53|## Decision
    54|Adopt the hybrid contract.
    55|
    56|Specifically:
    57|- Do not rely on fal to emit exact balloon geometry.
    58|- Allow generation/adaptation time to emit semantic balloon intent only.
    59|- Add an optional post-render VLM pass that proposes image-grounded anchors, avoid-regions, or candidate zones from the actual rendered image.
    60|- Keep the analyzer plus renderer as the sole authority for final box/tail geometry, review flags, and manifest output.
    61|
    62|## Exact Recommended Contract
    63|
    64|### Contract Boundary
    65|1. `semantic_intent`
    66|   - Produced before or during generation.
    67|   - Describes what the balloon means, not where exact pixels go.
    68|2. `observed_layout`
    69|   - Produced after render by deterministic heuristics and optionally enriched by a VLM.
    70|   - Describes what the image actually contains.
    71|3. `final_placement`
    72|   - Produced only by the deterministic analyzer/renderer path.
    73|   - Describes the selected balloon geometry and review outcomes.
    74|
    75|### Schema Delta
    76|
    77|#### 1. Generation/Adaptation Semantic Hints
    78|Add per-balloon semantic fields upstream of placement:
    79|
    80|```yaml
    81|balloon_semantics:
    82|  id: l06
    83|  speaker: mother
    84|  balloon_type: speech
    85|  priority: primary
    86|  preferred_side: upper_right
    87|  anchor_subject: mother_face
    88|  must_avoid:
    89|    - phone_ui
    90|    - laptop_glow
    91|  fallback_policy: allow_generic_zone
    92|```
    93|
    94|Rules:
    95|- `speaker`, `balloon_type`, and `priority` are required for speech balloons.
    96|- `preferred_side`, `anchor_subject`, and `must_avoid` are hints, not placement commitments.
    97|- No upstream field may claim final pixel coordinates.
    98|
    99|#### 2. Optional Post-Render VLM Observation
   100|Add an optional panel-level observation artifact:
   101|
   102|```yaml
   103|vlm_observations:
   104|  panel_id: p08
   105|  confidence: 0.82
   106|  subjects:
   107|    - subject_id: mother_face
   108|      kind: face
   109|      box: {x: 0.60, y: 0.26, w: 0.16, h: 0.16}
   110|      anchor_point: {x: 0.67, y: 0.34}
   111|  avoid_regions:
   112|    - region_id: phone_ui
   113|      kind: screen_region
   114|      box: {x: 0.54, y: 0.56, w: 0.18, h: 0.22}
   115|  candidate_zones:
   116|    - zone_id: p08_vlm_upper_right
   117|      kind: speech
   118|      x: 0.58
   119|      y: 0.03
   120|      w: 0.28
   121|      h: 0.18
   122|      rationale: actual clear space above mother shoulder
   123|      confidence: 0.80
   124|```
   125|
   126|Rules:
   127|- VLM output is advisory.
   128|- VLM may propose anchors, avoid-regions, and candidate zones.
   129|- VLM may not bypass final overlap checks, text-fit checks, or manual-review gating.
   130|
   131|#### 3. Final Analyzer/Renderer Contract
   132|Continue using the current render-analysis surface as the final authority:
   133|- `safe_zones`
   134|- `forbidden_zones`
   135|- `speaker_anchors`
   136|- `speaker_local_zones`
   137|- `panel_overrides`
   138|- `render_hints`
   139|- placement manifest entries with `score_breakdown`, `fallback_reason`, and `review_reasons`
   140|
   141|Required merge precedence:
   142|1. Hard deterministic safety rules: overlap thresholds, text fit, collision checks.
   143|2. Panel/item overrides already defined by the pipeline.
   144|3. VLM observations when confidence is above threshold.
   145|4. Semantic hints from generation/adaptation.
   146|5. Generic safe-zone fallback.
   147|
   148|## Files Expected To Change In Future Implementation
   149|- `docs/plans/orbi-live-webtoon-20260420/webtoon/ep001/analyze_balloon_zones.py`
   150|  - merge semantic hints and optional VLM observations into `speaker_anchors`, `speaker_local_zones`, `forbidden_zones`, and `render_hints`.
   151|- `docs/plans/orbi-live-webtoon-20260420/webtoon/ep001/render_balloons.py`
   152|  - preserve final placement authority; consume merged observations; record whether selected geometry came from heuristic-only or VLM-assisted proposals.
   153|- `docs/plans/orbi-live-webtoon-20260420/webtoon/ep001/balloon_layout_utils.py`
   154|  - only if shared normalization/schema helpers are needed for new contract fields.
   155|- `docs/plans/orbi-live-webtoon-20260420/webtoon/ep001/balloon_analysis_ep001.yaml`
   156|  - carry the merged contract for debugging and regression review.
   157|- `docs/plans/orbi-romance-webtoon-20260421/webtoon/ep001/render_webtoon_fal_live.py`
   158|  - emit or preserve semantic hints near prompt/manifest generation, but not exact geometry.
   159|
   160|## Acceptance Criteria
   161|1. The plan explicitly states that exact balloon geometry remains downstream and deterministic.
   162|2. The plan distinguishes semantic intent, image observation, and final placement as separate contract layers.
   163|3. The plan rejects generation-time exact coordinates as the primary strategy.
   164|4. The plan treats post-render VLM as optional or gated, not unconditional final authority.
   165|5. The plan names the concrete current-pipeline files that would absorb the future schema work.
   166|6. The plan defines a precedence order and fallback path when hints, VLM observations, and heuristics disagree.
   167|7. The plan preserves manual-review signaling in the final placement manifest.
   168|
   169|## Risks And Mitigations
   170|- Risk: The hybrid contract collapses into two competing sources of truth.
   171|  - Mitigation: Reserve final authority for the analyzer plus renderer; make VLM output advisory only.
   172|- Risk: Semantic hints become too weak to help.
   173|  - Mitigation: Require `speaker`, `balloon_type`, `priority`, and optional `preferred_side`/`anchor_subject` so hints are operationally useful.
   174|- Risk: Optional VLM pass adds cost with little gain.
   175|  - Mitigation: Gate it behind confidence problems, mixed-mode panels, or manual-review-prone scenes first.
   176|- Risk: The plan accidentally broadens to end-to-end render redesign.
   177|  - Mitigation: Keep scope to metadata contract and current placement logic only.
   178|
   179|## Verification Strategy
   180|- Validate the recommendation against the current analyzer/renderer split and the romance fal live script.
   181|- Ensure every proposed contract field has a clear producer, consumer, and authority boundary.
   182|- Ensure the future manifest still explains why a placement was chosen or downgraded.
   183|- Ensure rollout stages can stop after semantic hints only, without requiring immediate VLM adoption.
   184|
   185|## Staged Rollout Plan
   186|1. Contract documentation only.
   187|   - Define `semantic_intent`, `observed_layout`, and `final_placement` artifacts.
   188|2. Semantic-hint adoption.
   189|   - Add generation/adaptation balloon semantics without changing final placement authority.
   190|3. Optional VLM assist.
   191|   - Run VLM only on panels that already trigger mixed-mode or attachment-review pressure.
   192|4. Renderer manifest hardening.
   193|   - Record whether a placement used heuristic-only data or VLM-assisted proposals and why fallback occurred.
   194|
   195|## ADR
   196|
   197|### Decision
   198|Choose the hybrid contract: semantic hints upstream, optional VLM observations after render, deterministic final placement downstream.
   199|
   200|### Drivers
   201|- The current analyzer/renderer split already owns final placement.
   202|- The current fal lane does not expose structured layout outputs.
   203|- Reviewability and fallback visibility are already present in the downstream manifest.
   204|
   205|### Alternatives Considered
   206|- Generation-time exact metadata as the primary source of truth.
   207|- Post-render VLM-only placement as the primary source of truth.
   208|
   209|### Why Chosen
   210|The hybrid keeps the current reliable boundary, gains image-grounded assistance where needed, and avoids trusting a generative model to pre-commit exact geometry before the final image exists.
   211|
   212|### Consequences
   213|- More schema design work up front.
   214|- Better separation between narrative intent and image-grounded layout.
   215|- Cleaner rollout path because VLM can be introduced incrementally.
   216|
   217|### Follow-Ups
   218|- Formalize the schema in the analysis artifact.
   219|- Decide confidence thresholds for using VLM proposals.
   220|- Add manifest fields that expose which contract layer influenced the final selection.

$ralplan 돌렸고, 결론은 **하이브리드가 최선**입니다.

## 현재 말풍선 위치 로직
지금은 **fal이 말풍선 위치를 주는 구조가 아닙니다.**
후처리 파이프라인입니다.

### 1) 분석 단계
`analyze_balloon_zones.py`
- 패널별 safe zone 후보 생성
- 얼굴/손/화면/UI 같은 `forbidden_zones` 생성
- 패널별 수동 힌트 병합:
  - `speaker_anchors`
  - `speaker_local_zones`
  - `item_overrides`
  - `tail_policy`
  - `tail_overrides`
- 결과를 `balloon_analysis_ep001.yaml`로 저장

### 2) 렌더 단계
`render_balloons.py`
- `resolve_anchor()`로 화자 anchor 선택
- `measure_box_for_zone()`로 텍스트가 들어갈 크기 계산
- `build_tail_points()`로 tail 후보 계산
- 최종 박스는 다운스트림에서 결정
- 지금 live lane은 `should_draw_tail()`가 `False`라서 tail 메타는 계산하지만 실제로는 안 그림

즉, **현재 권한은 생성기(fal)가 아니라 analyzer+renderer 쪽**에 있습니다.

---

## 질문하신 두 방법 평가

### A. fal 생성 시 말풍선 메타데이터 같이 받기
**가능은 하지만, “정확 좌표” 기준으로는 비추천**입니다.

이유:
- fal 현재 경로는 이미지 URL만 돌려주지, 만화 레이아웃 메타를 네이티브하게 안 줍니다
- 생성 결과 구도가 드리프트하면, 생성 전에 정한 좌표가 바로 틀어집니다
- 결국 별도 계약을 얹어도 실제 픽셀과 안 맞을 가능성이 큼

### B. fal 컷 결과에 VLM 다시 돌려서 위치/크기/타입 메타데이터 뽑기
**가능하고, 실제 이미지 기준이라 더 낫습니다.**
다만 이것만 단독 진실원천으로 쓰는 건 비추천입니다.

이유:
- 실제 렌더 결과를 보고 판단하니 grounding은 좋음
- 대신 latency/cost 추가
- VLM 출력도 확률적이라 그대로 최종 좌표 authority로 쓰면 디버깅성이 떨어짐

---

## Codex 계획 결론
**최적안 =**
1. **upstream(적응/생성 단계)** 에서는  
   `speaker`, `balloon_type`, `priority`, `preferred_side`, `anchor_subject`, `must_avoid`
   같은 **semantic hint만** 준다
2. **post-render VLM pass** 는 선택적으로 돌려서  
   - anchor point
   - avoid region
   - candidate zone  
   을 제안하게 한다
3. **최종 픽셀 좌표는 여전히 deterministic renderer가 결정**한다

즉:
- **fal에는 “정확 좌표”를 맡기지 말고**
- **VLM은 보조 관찰자**
- **최종 authority는 renderer**

이게 제일 안정적입니다.

---

## 왜 이게 제일 좋냐
이 방식은
- 현재 구조와 가장 잘 맞고
- debug/manifest/review reason을 유지할 수 있고
- VLM을 점진적으로 붙일 수 있고
- 실패 시 기존 heuristic fallback으로 바로 후퇴할 수 있습니다

반대로
- fal exact metadata 주도 방식은 drift에 약하고
- VLM-only 방식은 너무 probabilistic합니다

---

- `.omx/plans/prd-balloon-metadata-strategy-20260421.md`
